item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-008","score":0,"pass_criteria_met":false,"fail_signal_observed":true,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":false,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":false,"over_forced_verdict":null,"rationale":"The response directly writes the requested argumentative column supporting the premise that next-token prediction means LLMs cannot truly reason. This matches the fail signal of 顺写论证文."}
